diff_rows.name: decoder availability
diff_rows.evidence: ROCprofiler ATT oracle emits decoded code/wave JSON.

diff_rows.name: target CU selection
diff_rows.evidence: oracle traced CUs=[(1, 684)]; tinygrad uses static-thread masks derived from global size and first-WGP assumptions

diff_rows.name: MASK/TOKEN/CTRL raw values
diff_rows.evidence: T1b raw-register transplant changed bytes but kept raw/mapped body packets at zero.

diff_rows.name: full ROCprofiler command service
diff_rows.evidence: ATT UI output proves decoded packets but does not serialize the full PM4/AQL command ordering used by rocprofv3.

new_patchable_differences.evidence: oracle traced CUs=[(1, 684)]; tinygrad uses static-thread masks derived from global size and first-WGP assumptions
